checkIn.question: How are you holding up today?
checkIn.privacyAttached: Patterns are shared only with your {{orgName}} coach.
checkIn.privacyDirect: Patterns stay private unless you choose to share them with a coach.
checkIn.moodHint: Tap an emoji above to select your mood
checkIn.noMoodMessage: Tap one of the emojis above to record how you're feeling, then complete your check-in.
checkIn.errorMessage: Something went wrong saving your check-in. Please try again.
checkIn.lowSupportBody: That's {{count}} hard days lately — a lot to carry alone. A coach can help you steady things in one private hour, just for you.

scriptPractice.title: Practice a difficult conversation
scriptPractice.subtitle: Script rehearsal: money, crisis, or repair

boundaryReview.title: Review your boundary walls
boundaryReview.subtitle: 2-minute check: which walls need attention today?

selfCare.title: Your own recovery: 10-min walk
selfCare.subtitle: Caring for yourself isn't selfish — it's the plan

dailyCheckIn.title: Complete your daily check-in
dailyCheckIn.subtitle: Track how you're holding up — patterns tell the story

group.title: Join tonight's family support group
group.subtitle: You are not alone in this

anchor.title: Read your anchor statement
anchor.subtitle: "I will not enable behaviors that harm my family"

supportNetwork.title: Reach out to someone who gets it
supportNetwork.subtitle: Text or call one person in your support network today

enabling.title: Spot one enabling pattern
enabling.subtitle: Name one thing you do that protects the addiction, not the person

research.title: Look into treatment options
research.subtitle: Know the options before the conversation — be ready

journal.title: Write for five minutes
journal.subtitle: What's weighing on you? Getting it out helps you let it go

openingLine.title: Practice your opening line
openingLine.subtitle: "I'm here because I love you and I need you to hear me."

dailyQuote.0: You didn't cause it, you can't control it, you can't cure it.
dailyQuote.1: Caring for yourself is the most powerful thing you can do for your family.
dailyQuote.2: Progress, not perfection, is the goal.
dailyQuote.3: You cannot save someone who doesn't want to be saved — but you can stay whole.
dailyQuote.4: Your limits are not punishments. They are your values made visible.
dailyQuote.5: The only way out is through — together.
dailyQuote.6: Love the person. Decline the chaos.
dailyQuote.7: Recovery happens in community, not isolation.
dailyQuote.8: Setting a limit is an act of love.
dailyQuote.9: Holding your ground is how you show up.
dailyQuote.10: You are not the disease. Neither is your family.
dailyQuote.11: Every day you stay steady is a day you model recovery for someone who is watching.
dailyQuote.12: Let go of what you cannot control. Hold on to what matters.
dailyQuote.13: Boundaries create the space where healing can happen.

moodChart.noData: Check in daily to see your emotional arc here.

situationCta.freeCall: Save my spot on the free call
situationCta.coachingSub: Carrying a lot this week? A private hour to map your next move — $150.
situationCta.interventionSub: When it's time for more than an app, Matt will walk with you step by step.
